THE LONG WAY HERE

A decade in classrooms, one step at a time

From a BSc in Lahore to a PhD candidacy — every stop sharpened one question: how do people actually learn, and how can AI serve that better?

01
2012 — 2015

Foundations

BSc, University of Punjab → B.Ed., AIOU

Built a base in statistics, mathematics and computing, then formalised a passion for teaching with a Bachelor of Education.

02
2015 — 2022

Deepening the craft

MIT, Virtual University → MS Computer Science, Riphah International University

Specialised across AI, Software Engineering and Human-Computer Interaction while teaching full-time — research questions kept circling back to the classroom.

03
2016 — 2025

Leading departments & publishing research

PIASS → Rashid Latif Khan University, Lahore

From visiting lecturer to Head of Department to Departmental Coordinator — five peer-reviewed publications and a Best Teacher Award along the way.

04
2026 — Onwards

PhD Candidate + Digital Entrepreneur

PhD · Computer Science · HCI & AI in Education

Pursuing doctoral research on intelligent educational systems — while simultaneously building AI Wali Madam, a digital brand making AI tools accessible to everyone.

IN THE CLASSROOM

A decade of departments, students & curricula

JAN 2025 — PRESENT

Lecturer & Departmental Coordinator

Rashid Latif Khan University (RLKU), Lahore
  • Teaching AI, HCI, ICT, Software Engineering and Computer Networks at undergraduate level
  • Developing digital learning materials, lab manuals, AI-integrated course content and assessments
  • Departmental coordination, timetabling and ORIC research reporting
  • Active researcher — 5 peer-reviewed publications in AI, HCI, Software Engineering and EdTech
2022 — 2025

Lecturer & Head of Department

PIASS (University of Education), Kasur
  • Led all departmental operations including faculty coordination and academic scheduling
  • Taught IT Fundamentals, Database Systems and MS Office Applications
  • Supervised 15+ BS Final Year Projects across AI, HCI, Software Engineering and EdTech
  • Spearheaded curriculum review aligned with HEC guidelines
2016 — 2020

Visiting Lecturer — CS & ICT

Govt. Postgraduate College for Women, Concordia & Various Institutions, Kasur
  • Delivered CS and ICT courses at intermediate and undergraduate levels
  • Provided academic mentoring and exam preparation support
⭐
Best Teacher Award — PIASS University of Education, Kasur, 2022
